programme.title: E3 - Love in the Air
programme.desc: Check in with animals who are winners at the aerial mating game. Take flight with a bee crafting a custom love potion, watch a draco lizard soar to fend off rivals, and witness the graceful pas de deux that bonds a pair of Japanese cranes for life.

programme.title: E10 - Vietnam: the Journey's End
programme.desc: The Mekong Delta is one of the largest on Earth. Formed over the last 8000 years, it fans out and discharges into the South China Sea via nine channels. These channels split and shape the coastline, creating unique habitats for a variety of animals.

programme.title: E2 - March-April - a Time of Renewal
programme.desc: Travel around the globe to witness the atmospheric shifts that take place in March, from the wave of cherry blossoms that unfold across Japan to the final raft of green sea turtles that arrive on the Great Barrier Reef islands to lay eggs.

programme.title: E2 - March-April - a Time of Renewal
programme.desc: Travel around the globe to witness the atmospheric shifts that take place in March, from the wave of cherry blossoms that unfold across Japan to the final raft of green sea turtles that arrive on the Great Barrier Reef islands to lay eggs.

programme.title: E3 - Heat
programme.desc: Go to extremes, from the Sahara to the outback, where animals are teaching us how to survive in our heating world. Shelter in caves with chimps, see camels sip salt water, and listen as zebra finches sing to their eggs to make their chicks smaller.

programme.title: E6 - Buffalo Showdown
programme.desc: To the lion, the buffalo is not only a satisfying dinner but also dangerous. Track a herd of 300 buffalo along with the Mwamba pride, who must act quickly and carefully if they are to take down their prey.

programme.desc: To the lion, the buffalo is not only a satisfying dinner but also dangerous. Track a herd of 300 buffalo along with the Mwamba pride, who must act quickly and carefully if they are to take down their prey.

programme.title: E3 - Love in the Air
programme.desc: Check in with animals who are winners at the aerial mating game. Take flight with a bee crafting a custom love potion, watch a draco lizard soar to fend off rivals, and witness the graceful pas de deux that bonds a pair of Japanese cranes for life.

programme.title: E3 - Love in the Air
programme.desc: Check in with animals who are winners at the aerial mating game. Take flight with a bee crafting a custom love potion, watch a draco lizard soar to fend off rivals, and witness the graceful pas de deux that bonds a pair of Japanese cranes for life.

programme.title: E3 - Heat
programme.desc: Go to extremes, from the Sahara to the outback, where animals are teaching us how to survive in our heating world. Shelter in caves with chimps, see camels sip salt water, and listen as zebra finches sing to their eggs to make their chicks smaller.

programme.desc: The Squirrels are having fun trying out games but are surprised to find out that Betty didn't always enjoy playing.

programme.title: E11 - Harbin Ice City, China
programme.desc: GrimHQ overheats so lands in Harbin Ice City, melting the amazing ice sculptures.

programme.title: E6 - Holiday
programme.desc: Captain Captain decides she needs a break from Sandy and Seaweed and books a holiday.

programme.title: E10 - Rug Island
programme.desc: On Bingo and Bluey's Rug Island, a pack of felt pens can be anything: bananas, campfires, even a snake. But Dad will need to embrace his inner kid if he wants to make it his home.

programme.title: E6 - The Why Badge
programme.desc: Why do my feet hurt?', Tag asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: E8 - The Monster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to help Plinky find her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: E20 - Driving
programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: E21 - Planet Wobble
programme.desc: Messy and friends rocket into space, but a mischievous Messy sends OKIDO's seasons into chaos! Time to fix this planet wobble.

programme.desc: JoJo learns how fun the hairdresser's can be when she goes with Gran Gran for a trim. After helping the hairdresser, JoJo also gets her own new style ready for Ezra's party!

programme.desc: Scarf Lady's old film reels get themselves in a tangle, so Sarah and Duck decide to recreate the footage.

programme.title: E20 - Drum
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'drum' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see and hear lots of drums - a marching drum, a dancing drum and of course a drumming drum!

programme.title: E26 - Mojo Draws The Line
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo were supposed to paint fresh lines on the street. But when they get into a race with Tao, the paint goes in every direction, causing wild traffic chaos.

programme.title: E44 - Wild Girls
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: E11 - The Cheerleading Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels find Duggee's cheerleader pompoms, so he shows them his old moves. Time to practice: Duggee at the chess board, the Squirrels as a squad. There's a big match ahead...

programme.title: E18 - The Making Friends Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are off for a Jamboree to make some new friends, play games and have a picnic. They meet another group of young animals with their very own version of Duggee but everything they do is different.

programme.title: E16 - The Medicine Badge
programme.desc: Duggee's not very well, he's lost his voice. The Squirrels want to make him feel better. Duggee tries to tell them that he needs some water but the Squirrels don't quite understand, so they ask all the other animals for advice. Does anyone have the answer?

programme.title: E28 - Wolong Panda Reserve, China
programme.desc: The Go Jetters visit a nature reserve in China. But who's taking all the pandas' bamboo?

programme.title: E30 - Leaves
programme.desc: There are leaves all over the place, Stanley tries to gather them up in his van with his leaf blower, but it is harder than he thought and fills Myrtle's house with them instead.

programme.title: E29 - Mermaid
programme.desc: Fifi asks Stanley to help them find a Mermaid so they can take its picture for school. They explore the ocean floor in their search where they encounter lots of ocean creatures.

programme.title: E7 - Middle Of The World City: Ecuador
programme.desc: Glitch and his Glitchbots pretend to be the Go Jetters.

programme.title: Premium Spectacular: Black Gold: The Century-Long Game of the Petrodollar
programme.desc: In April 2026, the international energy market enters a red alert. The Strait of Hormuz has been blocked for over a month, the fate of the second round of U.S.-Iran negotiations remains uncertain, and oil prices continue to soar. Amid the turmoil, the 'petrodollar,' a cornerstone of U.S. financial hegemony, is facing unprecedented challenges. Currently, about 20% of global oil trade has begun to bypass dollar settlements. From military intervention in Venezuela to igniting the powder keg of the Middle East, are Donald Trump’s aggressive actions an attempt to reshape the old cycle, or a high-stakes gamble amid the wave of de-dollarization?

programme.title: E134
programme.desc: “We Are One” uses a documentary shooting method, from the perspective of people, animals, and nature living in harmony, tells a touching story of cross-species, highlighting the noble sentiments of purity and kindness. As the sons of the earth, we are in harmony with nature, and all things coexist with love. From January 21, 2023, Phoenix Chinese Channel will launch a weekly documentary program of human and animals “We Are One” with a total duration of 26 minutes.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: E6 - Magic, A Blob, A Show & A Bubble!
programme.desc: Join Bubbles for a day of magic, a blob, a show & a bubble! First, Bubbles is excited to watch Pogo's magic show, but her curiosity gets the better of her & she spoils his tricks! Then, she invents a brand new bouncy blob, but it bounces out of control & causes havoc all over the Bodpod! The adventures continue as Bubbles gets stage fright before a big show & tries her best to stop a giant, beautiful bubble from popping.

programme.title: E1 - From Dinosaurs To Pet Knights!
programme.desc: Blippi is on an adventure from dinosaurs to pet knights! He travels back in time with Tabbs to help a little Microraptor prove that being small has its benefits when they rescue a giant sauropod from the mud. Then, they head to the African savannah to learn how to roar, sneak & pounce like a lion! Back at the clubhouse, Blippi learns how to interpret a puppy's tail wags & even travels back in time again to help a real-life knight in shining armor—who happens to be a corgi!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Day with Cody!
programme.desc: Spend a super fun day with Cody from morning to night! Join Toni & Cody as they bond during a special Hair Wash Day, where they scrub, rinse & comb his perfect curls. Then, Cody dresses up in a safari outfit & leads his Dad on a quest through a jungle-like environment to find dinosaurs! The fun day ends with a silly bedtime routine where his parents make deliberate mistakes, prompting laughs from Cody as he 'corrects' them.

programme.title: E1 - When Arpo's Imagination Runs Wild!
programme.desc: Get ready for adventure as Arpo's imagination runs wild! After a bump on the head, Arpo is convinced he's a pirate, leading the family on a swashbuckling adventure for treasure. Then, Arpo builds an epic backyard rollercoaster for Daniel, but it's up to Totbot to save the day when it goes out of control! The fantasy continues when Arpo accidentally creates a giant, sentient jelly monster that takes over the entire house & needs to be stopped!

programme.title: E5 - A Super Creative Day of Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super creative day of play with Twinkle! First, it's time to get musical! Each toadstool makes a different musical note, allowing Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to create a musical tune. Then, get creative as Twinkle has fun painting a picture of what she sees. The fun continues as Twinkle shares a box full of super fun toys, & her friends learn how to play new musical instruments!

programme.title: E6 - JJ's Favorite Games & Vehicles!
programme.desc: It's time to play JJ's favorite games! Join Ms. Appleberry & the Melon Patch kids as they play 'follow the leader' & have a contest to see who can make the silliest funny face. Then, JJ & his animal friends have a party where they play freeze dance! The fun continues with vehicles, as Grandpa makes a cool choo-choo train out of cardboard boxes & the kids play with different construction vehicles in a giant sandpit.

programme.title: E6 - JJ's Favorite Games & Vehicles!

Then, JJ & his animal friends have a party where they play freeze dance! The fun continues with vehicles, as Grandpa makes a cool choo-choo train out of cardboard boxes & the kids play with different construction vehicles in a giant sandpit.

programme.title: E6 - JJ's Favorite Games & Vehicles!

Then, JJ & his animal friends have a party where they play freeze dance! The fun continues with vehicles, as Grandpa makes a cool choo-choo train out of cardboard boxes & the kids play with different construction vehicles in a giant sandpit.

programme.title: E5 - Small Wonders of Earth Week
programme.desc: Blippi explores the small wonders of Earth Week! He shrinks down to meet a friendly ant colony on a mission to find food. Then, he learns why flies love garbage trucks & meets a singing worm in the mud! The tiny adventures continue as Blippi discovers how spiders make webs, helps a blue jay rebuild its nest & flies inside a beehive to see how honey is made!

programme.title: E1 - Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some creative farm adventures with Ella! First, Ella brings school to Lellobee City Farm by creating a classroom in the Boogie Barn & teaching all her animal friends. Then, she helps Mei make some delicious jam using fresh strawberries, grapes & blueberries from the farm! The creative day ends with a magical night of stargazing, where Mei points out constellations that look just like the animals on the farm.

programme.title: E10 - Exploring Nature For Earth Week
programme.desc: Get ready for exploring nature for Earth Week! Baby John goes camping & overcomes his fear of the dark by looking at beautiful stars. Then, the family visits the Grand Canyon to see eagles & lizards! The nature fun continues with a trip to the lake for swimming & fishing. Plus, Super Baby John helps clean up the park & the family plants a tree to take care of the environment!

programme.title: E6 - Magic, A Blob, A Show & A Bubble!
programme.desc: Join Bubbles for a day of magic, a blob, a show & a bubble! First, Bubbles is excited to watch Pogo's magic show, but her curiosity gets the better of her & she spoils his tricks! Then, she invents a brand new bouncy blob, but it bounces out of control & causes havoc all over the Bodpod! The adventures continue as Bubbles gets stage fright before a big show & tries her best to stop a giant, beautiful bubble from popping.

programme.title: E5 - Luxe De Poche/Selva Negra/Nathalie Seiller Dejean
programme.desc: An exhibition called ''Luxe de poche'' (''Pocket Luxury'') reveals the refined accessories of the 18th century, reflecting the habits and customs of the time. The famous traditional Black Forest cake drew its name from a German region. Nathalie Seiller Dejean transforms straw into a treasure trove of refinement. How to wear bootcut trousers.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: A duck dish and two sides were featured on the last first-class dinner menu served on the ''Titanic'' in April 1912. The participants must try to recreate it.

programme.desc: One of the most Parisian and unusual designers discusses her spring-summer 2023 haute couture collection. The focus is firmly on the versatility of the garments, the work on the bias and sequins...

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: A duck dish and two sides were featured on the last first-class dinner menu served on the ''Titanic'' in April 1912. The participants must try to recreate it.

programme.title: E100
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E36 - In Uzes (1)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Uzes, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in Gard olive oil and in the Fenestrelle Tower.

programme.title: Maka 2
programme.desc: It is a youth-oriented drama series that follows the lives of six high school students enrolled in the Arts & Performance section of public school, Douglas Mac Arthur High School for the Arts aka. MAKA.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Encantadia Chronicles: Sang'gre
programme.desc: The series is a spin-off to the Philippine television fantasy drama series, Encantadia.

programme.desc: It features two families who compete to name the most popular answers to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes

Priced Out Of Lisbon: When A Full-Time Job Isn't Enough
programme.desc: Lisbon is considered a dream city; but when it comes to its housing market, many people who live and work here are fighting to survive.

programme.title: The Last Pole-And-Line Fishermen Of The Azores
programme.desc: Rod fishing has a long tradition in the Azores. It is the only method of tuna fishing permitted on the Atlantic islands - and the most sustainable. A counterpoint to industrial fishing and 'floating tuna factories.'

programme.title: Priced Out Of Lisbon: When A Full-Time Job Isn't Enough
programme.desc: Lisbon is considered a dream city; but when it comes to its housing market, many people who live and work here are fighting to survive.

programme.title: The Last Pole-And-Line Fishermen Of The Azores
programme.desc: Rod fishing has a long tradition in the Azores. It is the only method of tuna fishing permitted on the Atlantic islands - and the most sustainable. A counterpoint to industrial fishing and 'floating tuna factories.'

programme.title: Malta's Heritage On Wheels: The Fight To Save Its Buses
programme.desc: Malta's hand-painted buses, each one unique, once ferried locals and tourists alike. Now few remain, lovingly restored by specialist coachbuilders. We also ride with police on speed patrol and test the VinFast VF 6.

programme.title: Priced Out Of Lisbon: When A Full-Time Job Isn't Enough
programme.desc: Lisbon is considered a dream city; but when it comes to its housing market, many people who live and work here are fighting to survive.

programme.title: Visa And Travel
programme.desc: From the waves of Robertsport to the roads of East Africa, this episode crosses borders. We ask why it's so hard to move within Africa, follow a truck driver on the Northern Corridor, and discover Seychelles' Creole culture.

programme.title: Malta's Heritage On Wheels: The Fight To Save Its Buses
programme.desc: Malta's hand-painted buses, each one unique, once ferried locals and tourists alike. Now few remain, lovingly restored by specialist coachbuilders. We also ride with police on speed patrol and test the VinFast VF 6.

programme.title: Considering A Solo Trip? Eva Zu Beck And DW Reporters Share Their Experienc
programme.desc: Solo travel is on the rise - but what does it really take to explore the world on your own, especially as a woman? In this episode, global explorer Eva zu Beck and DW Travel hosts share their personal insights and experiences from years of solo travel. Be sure to watch until the end, when Eva zu Beck, Hanna Hummel, Sarah Hucal, Aisha Sharipzhan and Goenna Ketels reveal their most helpful tips.

programme.desc: From the waves of Robertsport to the roads of East Africa, this episode crosses borders. We ask why it's so hard to move within Africa, follow a truck driver on the Northern Corridor, and discover Seychelles' Creole culture.

programme.title: The Last Pole-And-Line Fishermen Of The Azores
programme.desc: Rod fishing has a long tradition in the Azores. It is the only method of tuna fishing permitted on the Atlantic islands - and the most sustainable. A counterpoint to industrial fishing and 'floating tuna factories.'

programme.title: Malta's Heritage On Wheels: The Fight To Save Its Buses
programme.desc: Malta's hand-painted buses, each one unique, once ferried locals and tourists alike. Now few remain, lovingly restored by specialist coachbuilders. We also ride with police on speed patrol and test the VinFast VF 6.

programme.title: E117 - A Killer Fight
programme.desc: After a beloved Mobile man is gunned down in his front yard, conflicting eyewitness accounts leave detectives wondering if the suspect might have acted in self-defence.

programme.title: E1 - Party Killer Or Innocent Bystander?
programme.desc: A Louisiana trail-ride dance party is cut short when shots ring out. A man dies, and his daughter's partner—who was standing nearby—is accused.

programme.title: E5 - Adam Matos
programme.desc: When an entire family is found in a decaying pile of bodies by the side of a Florida road, the hunt is on to find what police fear might be two more victims, Adam Matos and his four-year-old autistic son.

programme.title: E2 - The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: The community of Macon, GA, is gripped in a wave of terror when a beautiful law student disappears from her apartment complex. Nobody knows where she could be or what could have happened.

programme.title: E5 - A World Of Hurt
programme.desc: In the sunny cities of Daytona and Cocoa, ATF Special Agent Perala is reminded of the importance of listening to your gut. His life is threatened when suspects turn the tables on him.

programme.title: E8 - Pocket Knife Killer Or Vulnerable Vacationer?
programme.desc: A day out on the river with friends ends in a deadly encounter when a man stabs five people with a pocket knife, following a terrifying confrontation.

Flight of the Godwits
programme.desc: When Newts needs instructions on how to film the godwits migrating, but Darwin is stuck in the treehouse, they build a series of listening mirrors to keep in communication.

programme.title: Vik Saves the Day
programme.desc: Vik becomes a real superhero with Yoko's magical help, but soon discovers his real superpower is being a good friend.

programme.title: The Recycling Bandit
programme.desc: Addison and her friends are distracted from their mission of making cool costumes for Ayrton Park's version of Comicon when someone or something starts messing with recycling bins all over the neighbourhood.

programme.title: Naomi's Birthday
programme.desc: Naomi's birthday is coming, and she's planned it all-including the pricey gift her friends must buy. To afford it, Albert writes homework, Carol babysits, Flippy dances, and Robbie... borrows from Naomi! But will the gift-and the party-be all she hoped for?

programme.title: Mouth v Knee
programme.desc: The doctors investigate which part of the body heals the fastest, the mouth or the knee. And in the emergency department, Sophie has a screw in her foot!

programme.title: Pop Up Paper
programme.desc: In this episode we all turn into paper engineers as we are introduced to the art of origami. With the use of a standard sheet of paper, a few cuts, and some reverse folds, we're able to construct our own 3D objects. Pretty cool!

programme.title: Back on the Road
programme.desc: The Icicles are taking a huge risk and have choreographed a very ambitious routine. Charlie and Freddie are off to a competition in Guildford via Grandma's house for a sleepover. And a talented young skater from Russia has got everyone in a spin.

programme.title: The Recycling Bandit
programme.desc: Addison and her friends are distracted from their mission of making cool costumes for Ayrton Park's version of Comicon when someone or something starts messing with recycling bins all over the neighbourhood.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Shrinking Rink
programme.desc: Addison's plans for a local version of the winter Olympics are in jeopardy unless she can figure out why their outdoor ice skating rink keeps mysteriously melting and running away.

programme.title: Trip to Alaska
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are making ice cream when Alim arrives with a smoked herring, ready to add it in. The kids protest-fish in ice cream? Alim challenges them and takes them to Alaska, where Jamie shows them that traditional ice cream there is made with seal fat and fish!

programme.title: Doki and Ducki
programme.desc: Doki stumbles upon a newly hatched duckling. To Doki's surprise, the duckling follows him! It seems like ‘Ducki' has mistakenly imprinted on Doki and thinks he's his mama! To set things right, half the team heads off to search lake Weewannanoh for the mother.

programme.title: Doki and Ducki
programme.desc: Doki stumbles upon a newly hatched duckling. To Doki's surprise, the duckling follows him! It seems like ‘Ducki' has mistakenly imprinted on Doki and thinks he's his mama! To set things right, half the team heads off to search lake Weewannanoh for the mother.

programme.title: Invisiboy!
programme.desc: Bored, Robbie visits Motor and secretly takes his invisibility helmet. Now invisible, he pranks everyone! But soon he realizes being unseen isn't so fun after all. The helmet's locked, and he needs help-how do you take off something no one can see... or reach?

programme.title: The Day Henry Met....a Bus
programme.desc: Henry meets a red bus in London. Bus has lots of tourists arriving for a tour but his driver has gotten stuck in traffic.

programme.title: Doki by the Dozen
programme.desc: How can we make a lot of cupcakes fast, and without getting in each other's way? To find out, Doki's team visits a toy factory in Germany where they see how an assembly line can help to make a lot of identical items in a short period.

programme.title: The President (F.W. de Klerk) and The Pioneer (Valerie Amos)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, former President of South Africa and Nobel Peace Prize winner President F.W. de Klerk and first Black woman member of the British Government and pioneering British diplomat Valerie Amos share their life lessons.

programme.title: We Can Be Heroes
programme.desc: The Acro squads are working hard to overcome injury and finesse their routines for the South West Acrobatic Championships. Meanwhile, Amelie and Phoebe have been selected to represent Great Britain at the Junior European Championships in Glasgow.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: We go behind the scenes with Coca Cola Zero Sugar as they produce 1 billion litres of the iconic drink. Plus the USA cook up a storm and a classic British motorcycle rolls off the production line every 45 seconds in India.

programme.desc: Griff Rhys Jones' journey across NZ using only the back roads sees him travel from Queenstown, over The Remarkables, and finishes his trip at the very tip of the country, Bluff.

programme.desc: Women of Troy is an HBO documentary exploring the career of the Cheryl Miller-led USC Trojans and their impact on women's basketball.

programme.desc: The closure of a beloved New York City diner deeply affects its employees and neighbors in this HBO Original Movie.

programme.title: E6 - Off The Record
programme.desc: Multi-platinum DJ Jam Master Jay is executed in his recording studio.

programme.title: All The Devils Are Here
programme.desc: After a heist, four criminals lay low in a remote safehouse. As paranoia builds, one thing becomes clear: the real threat is already inside.

programme.title: Everyday People
programme.desc: The closure of a beloved New York City diner deeply affects its employees and neighbors in this HBO Original Movie.

programme.title: Ferrell Takes The Field
programme.desc: In this HBO Comedy Special, Will Ferrell takes the field and plays every position for ten different baseball teams over ten days.

programme.desc: A comedy set on a college campus centering on an author's (Steve Carell) complicated relationship with his daughter (Charly Clive).

programme.title: Everyday People
programme.desc: The closure of a beloved New York City diner deeply affects its employees and neighbors in this HBO Original Movie.

programme.title: E1 - 各國開學那些事兒
programme.desc: 一檔外國人用中文搞事情的文化訪談類節目，由4名主席團成員大左、楊迪、陳銘及陳超，1名飛行嘉賓與10名不同國家的青年代表聚集在一起，以詼諧態度和調侃精神，增進中國與世界文化的交流，圍繞社會話題及各國風俗文化進行討論。

programme.title: E39
programme.desc: 突破傳統的交友方式，24位單身女生以亮燈和滅燈方式來決定男嘉賓去留，通過「愛之初體驗」、「愛之再判斷」、「愛之終決選」、「男生權利」等決定男女嘉賓的速配成功。

programme.title: E2 - 海邊真心話大冒險
programme.desc: 由伊能靜、黃聖依、朱正廷、金子涵、戴燕妮、張純燁6位常駐戀愛觀察員、微反應專家姜振宇以及鄭爽組成「戀愛觀察團」，見證素人嘉賓們從素不相識到牽手成功的浪漫愛情故事。

programme.title: E11 - 江湖再見
programme.desc: 腦洞鑑定類綜藝推理脫口秀，陣容為薛之謙、大張偉、楊迪、劉維、黃子弘凡、黃聖依、龐博等…節目圍繞著當下熱梗熱點、觀眾的興趣點、共鳴點展開故事；火星特工廣發英雄帖正面對撞，迎戰近年最出圈、最有趣、最敢說的廠牌大咖們，真金不怕火煉，一場席卷全網的廠牌巔峰之戰即將展開！

programme.title: E2 - 光良陳卓璇對唱回憶拉滿
programme.desc: 在音樂主題上再度突破，以「一路為伍，向生綻放」為主題，甄選了貼近生活的歌曲和作品，用歌聲傳遞正能量；邀請了A-Lin、大張偉、庾澄慶、馬嘉祺、光良、蘇慧玲、任賢齊、陳卓璇、曾比特、白舉綱、吳莫愁等老、中、青三代歌手，在全新升級的「盲選配對」模式中組合獻唱，在代際傳承、時代交融中突破自我，打造一場最溫暖、最動人的音樂盛宴。

programme.title: E11 - 江湖再見
programme.desc: 腦洞鑑定類綜藝推理脫口秀，陣容為薛之謙、大張偉、楊迪、劉維、黃子弘凡、黃聖依、龐博等…節目圍繞著當下熱梗熱點、觀眾的興趣點、共鳴點展開故事；火星特工廣發英雄帖正面對撞，迎戰近年最出圈、最有趣、最敢說的廠牌大咖們，真金不怕火煉，一場席卷全網的廠牌巔峰之戰即將展開！

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains' is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: E11 - Cid 2.0
programme.desc: The iconic characters who were once close friends have now become bitter rivals, now 6 years later their world collide in the most unexpected & dramatic circumstances.

programme.title: E11 - Cid 2.0
programme.desc: The iconic characters who were once close friends have now become bitter rivals, now 6 years later their world collide in the most unexpected & dramatic circumstances.

programme.title: E11 - Cid 2.0
programme.desc: The iconic characters who were once close friends have now become bitter rivals, now 6 years later their world collide in the most unexpected & dramatic circumstances.

programme.title: E104 - Tailball
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: E105 - Moon Cow
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner.

programme.title: E224 - The Puppet / Gloop Gloop Ah-Ah
programme.desc: The Barbababies decide to create a show and go all out! // Barbotine wants to create the best lemonade.

programme.title: E105 - Moon Cow
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner.

programme.title: E105 - Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: E110 - Double Dare You / Roy
programme.desc: On a ski trip, the Barbapapas build a giant igloo. Barbabravo and Barbalib challenge each other to find out who is braver. // Barbabright creates a vacuuming robot that's also very good at soccer. The Barbababies organise a match against the robots.

programme.title: E616 - Pups Save The Balloon Pups / Pups Save The Spider Spies
programme.desc: Giant balloons floated away from a parade and it's up to the pups to save the pup balloons, the parade and Mayor Humdinger! // The Turbot cousins try to spot a rare spider, but get stuck in its web. It's up to the PAW Patrol save the spider spies!

programme.title: E203 - Beach Scanner / Tidy / Pets
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach. // Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin. // Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: E112 - A Guayabera For Tico / Falling Estrella's
programme.desc: Boots gets a Guayabera shirt as a gift for Tico, but becomes attached to it on the way to Tico's house. // Dora, Boots, and Papi want to see the Quetzal constellation dance across the sky, but it loses three stars! Dora has to get them back in time.

programme.title: E750 - Grandpa's Toy Plane
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig shares with Peppa and George his love of building toy planes and there is one extra special plane that Granny Pig has yet to see.

programme.title: E220 - The Crew Builds A Post Office / The Crew Builds A Super Farm Animal Wash
programme.desc: Builder Cove needs a post office! But when construction gets squirrely, it's up to the pups to find a construction solution. // Rubble & Crew use their construction skills to convert the super car wash and clean Farmer Zoe's sticky farm animals.

programme.title: E103 - Pups And The Kitty-Tastrophe / Pups Save A Train
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol rescue a lost kitty from the bay, but who will save them from all the mayhem she causes? // Ryder, Rubble, and Rocky call in Chase to help them free Katie and Cali's train from a rockslide!

programme.title: E105 - Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: E112 - The Cave Barbapapas / The Little Monsters
programme.desc: The barbababies discover a strange cave. Barbalib tells the story of the caves Barbapapa and how they transformed. // The Barbababies have a sleepover in the living room. Fearing the monsters in the closet, they set up wacky traps to catch them.

programme.title: E118 - The Crew Builds A Library Tea Shop / The Crew Builds A Dance Floor
programme.desc: Construction on the first Builder Cove library is abuzz with bees! This calls for an extra sweet constuction solution. / Grandpa Gravel teaches Charger all his best moves for the big dance contest. But will a runaway disco ball cost them first place?

programme.title: E807 - Parking Ticket
programme.desc: When Daddy Pig gets a parking ticket Peppa and George learn that adults have rules just like children.

programme.title: E409 - Meatball Mayhem
programme.desc: When Crusher accidentally knocks a bottle of 'grow spice' onto a meatball, it grows to an enormous size and rolls away! It's up to Blaze and Pickle to transform into robots and stop the meatball before it wrecks the entire town!

programme.title: E616 - Pups Save The Spider Spies
programme.desc: The Turbot cousins try to spot a rare spider, but get stuck in its web. It's up to the PAW Patrol save the spider spies!

programme.title: E224 - The Puppet / Gloop Gloop Ah-Ah
programme.desc: The Barbababies decide to create a show and go all out! // Barbotine wants to create the best lemonade.

programme.title: E118 - The Crew Builds A Library Tea Shop / The Crew Builds A Dance Floor
programme.desc: Construction on the first Builder Cove library is abuzz with bees! This calls for an extra sweet constuction solution. / Grandpa Gravel teaches Charger all his best moves for the big dance contest. But will a runaway disco ball cost them first place?

programme.title: E112 - A Guayabera For Tico / Falling Estrella's
programme.desc: Boots gets a Guayabera shirt as a gift for Tico, but becomes attached to it on the way to Tico's house. // Dora, Boots, and Papi want to see the Quetzal constellation dance across the sky, but it loses three stars! Dora has to get them back in time.

programme.title: E110 - Double Dare You / Roy
programme.desc: On a ski trip, the Barbapapas build a giant igloo. Barbabravo and Barbalib challenge each other to find out who is braver. // Barbabright creates a vacuuming robot that's also very good at soccer. The Barbababies organise a match against the robots.

programme.title: E112 - The Cave Barbapapas / The Little Monsters
programme.desc: The barbababies discover a strange cave. Barbalib tells the story of the caves Barbapapa and how they transformed. // The Barbababies have a sleepover in the living room. Fearing the monsters in the closet, they set up wacky traps to catch them.

programme.title: E203 - Beach Scanner / Tidy / Pets
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach. // Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin. // Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: E224 - The Puppet / Gloop Gloop Ah-Ah
programme.desc: The Barbababies decide to create a show and go all out! // Barbotine wants to create the best lemonade.

programme.title: E2 - The Last Laugh
programme.desc: After years of getting the raw end of the deal with Scrappy Larry, Robin pulls a prank on his old buddy, but the fun and games end when Claudia’s buyer makes an unexpected request.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: The students learn about life and death on the farm as baby crocodiles hatch in their hands and they have to kill an adult. Repeated fumbling in roping practice leaves John livid with everyone and Lyn’s frustration with diminutive Renee reaches boiling point.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: Renee catches a croc three times her size but Ryan is struggling. John takes Renee and Ryan on an overnight trip where they must share a motel room with crocodiles and the chance to go to Kakadu is on everyone’s mind.

programme.title: E3 - Zac Efron
programme.desc: World-renowned survivalist Bear Grylls leads Zac Efron (Neighbors (2014)) on a non-stop extreme survival journey into the Northeast Appalachian mountain range wilderness. With Bear's help, Zac challenges himself physically, as well as mentally, on an awe-inspiring journey he could never have imagined.

programme.desc: Your killer bestie is back! Armed with wild upgrades and her same iconic attitude, M3GAN faces off against an android who threatens her beloved Cady.

programme.title: Tad, The Lost Explorer, And The Secret Of King Midas
programme.desc: Tad travels to Las Vegas to see his friend Sara's latest discovery – a papyrus who turns everything he touches into gold.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When a dangerous crime wave hits the beach, the squad of lifeguards go on a mission to prove that you don’t have to wear a badge to save the bay.

programme.title: E11 - Small Space Big Taste
programme.desc: They say big things come in small packages, and in this episode host Michael Yo discovers that big flavours can come in small dining spaces as he squeezes into a four-table pancake house in Amsterdam.

programme.title: E3 - Fried Chicken Monte Cristo
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes Southern-style fried chicken Monte Cristo, served with a cranberry sauce. It's inspired by and similar to a croque monsieur, a delicious warm French ham and cheese sandwich.

programme.title: E11 - Small Space Big Taste

programme.title: E66 - Orlando: Sweetbriar
programme.desc: Team is back where it all began in the Jewel Oaks neighbourhood, where Duke and Keith first flipped a house together. Will they manage to restore this nightmare from the '60s as successfully as last time?

programme.title: E21 - Duck Schnitzel With Sweet Potato Waffles
programme.desc: Chef Deborah takes the chicken and waffles to the next level with her duck schnitzel and sweet potato waffles. She marinates and fries the duck, then mixes baked sweet potatoes with egg, milk and spices.

programme.title: E12 - Raquel And Samir
programme.desc: Despite being from different parts of the world, Raquel and Samir first bonded over their shared love of the ocean. Now married, they are racing to find the perfect coastal home.

programme.title: Murder At The Derby
programme.desc: Kara lands her dream job of working at a prestigious horse stable under the tutelage of Jennifer. As their relationship with develops, tensions grow with Jennifer's jealous brother, Stephen.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 《愛很美味》講述了三位個性迥異、特色鮮明的都市麗人，在經歷了一系列創業的艱辛，職場的壓迫，和感情的波折後，對生活、事業和愛情都有了重新的認識。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: Fagara
programme.desc: After her father died, a Hong Kong girl discovers she has two hitherto unknown sisters, one in Taiwan and one in China. To settle her father's debt, she must reunite with them to run the family's hot pot restaurant. While the androgynous Taiwan sister is plagued by her toxic relationship with her mother, the fashionista sister from China is trying to fend off her grandmother's pressure to get married. Meanwhile, she is striving to unshackle herself from her ex-boyfriend in order to start a new relationship.

programme.title: E41 - The Housemate
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.desc: When the team hits more wood deep in the Money Pit area where GPR results detected what could be a chamber, the Fellowship is more convinced than ever that their search for answers is about to pay off.

programme.title: E229 - The New Ufo Hunters
programme.desc: In the 21st century, UFOs have gone from fringe science to mainstream obsession. A new generation of UFO hunters is employing technology, and UFOs are being openly investigated by the government.

programme.title: E8 - National Treasures
programme.desc: From a bat swung by one of baseball's boldest pioneers to an iconic painting hidden behind a false wall, these finds prove that America's greatest treasures can turn up in the most unlikely places.

programme.title: Citizen Pinoy
programme.desc: Filipinos around the world hope to immigrate to the US, legalize their status in the US, or be reunited with their family in the US after years of separation. In this public service program, Attorney Michael J Gurfinkel explains, in plain English, the intricacies of US immigration laws and procedures, as well as advises of avenues to immigrate and developments in US immigration laws. Just because you're half a world away from home, you can still get answers to your US immigration questions.

programme.title: Cops And Robbers
programme.desc: A young man who was addicted to firearms wanted to be admitted to the police. He was not admitted because of his eye disease, which caused him psychological imbalance and he killed people everywhere. The police set up a special unit to arrest him. A fledgling policeman met the murderer on a narrow road...
